name: cindy8753--deepevidence
description: Evidence-based clinical assistant powered by DeepEvidence's OpenAI-compatible API (traceable citations). Use for complex clinical questions, drug safety evidence (dose/contraindications/interactions), guideline interpretation, and trial evidence synthesis. Outputs should be clinically verified before use. Triggers: DeepEvidence, evidence-based medicine, guideline interpretation, drug safety evidence, clinical trial evidence.
